name: [OnlyFans RPG] Become the Ultimate OF Creator
description:
🔞 Become the Ultimate OF Creator

  • 15 days total

  • 3 choices per day

  • Random events

Each day, you’ll be faced with temptations:

💦 Stream that lingerie haul, or sleep in?

📉 Ghost your fans, or drop a surprise nude for a cash spike?

💋 Collab with your rival, or leak the DM receipts?

Your stats will shift with every action. But remember: fame comes at a price, and not everyone survives going viral.

📊 Core Stats:

  • 💋 Hotness – How irresistible you are. High hotness = more subs, more stans, more chaos.

  • 💁 Charisma – Your pull in conversations, streams, and scandals. Makes or breaks your fanbase.

  • 🎨 Creativity – Fresh content ideas. Weird kinks? New trends? You’re either a muse or a copycat.

  • 💦 Stamina – How long you can keep up the grind. If it hits 0, you burn out. For real.

  • 🧠 Savvy – Business smarts. Can you dodge bad deals, monetize everything, and still stay sane?

  • 🔥 Clout – Your social heat. When it spikes, you’re everywhere. When it’s gone? You might as well vanish.

🎭 Game Loop:

  • Make 3 choices a day. Each one affects your stats, story, and psyche. (15 days total)

  • Random events can crash your brand or explode your fame — sometimes both.

  • Every post, every flirt, every collab… takes you deeper.
creator: puckish
